mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the labor market signals impending economic contraction, triggering risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns as earnings revisions turn downward.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the signal shows no predictive power over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in housing starts and consumer credit indicates robust aggregate demand, supporting corporate revenue forecasts and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns through earnings momentum.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a single-proxy baseline by at least 0.05 Rank IC, or forward returns are flat when both series rise simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production relative to employment growth reflects rising productivity and margin expansion, which directly boosts equity valuations and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO growth rate exceeds PAYEMS growth rate
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with high capacity utilization
failure_condition: The productivity spread shows no correlation with forward returns over a 5-year rolling window, or the signal generates negative returns during confirmed productivity booms.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarterly real GDP growth confirms economic expansion, sustaining corporate profit growth expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDP growth shows no predictive power for 60-day forward returns, or the signal produces negative returns during confirmed expansionary quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained inflation above the Federal Reserve's target threshold forces aggressive monetary tightening, raising discount rates and compressing equity valuations, which drives negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or neutral when inflation exceeds 2.5%, or the signal shows no statistical significance over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong non-farm payroll growth combined with a stable unemployment rate signals a resilient labor market, reducing recession risk and supporting positive S&P 500 forward returns through sustained consumer spending.
failure_condition: The joint labor signal fails to predict positive returns when both conditions are met, or forward returns are indistinguishable from baseline during strong hiring periods.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized rebound in housing construction and industrial output confirms a broad-based economic recovery, lifting cyclical equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: HOUST and INDPRO both rise > 2% month-over-month
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative or flat when both housing and industrial data show synchronized monthly gains, or the signal shows no edge over a 2-year walk-forward test.
